questions.text: Does the font family class per region (serif vs. sans-serif vs. monospace vs. display) on the agent's page match the reference's?
Is the body text size on the agent's page visually similar to the reference's body text size?
Does the heading-size hierarchy on the agent's page match the reference's relative ordering — whatever that ordering is?
Does the font weight per region (headings, body) on the agent's page match the reference's?
Is the visual differentiation between headings and body text on the agent's page — through some combination of size, weight, and color contrast — comparable in strength to the reference's?

Does the agent use a visibly distinct font family for headings vs. body text, matching the reference's choice — both use one family throughout → 1; both use a display + body split → 1; different choice → 0?
Is the agent's text size relative to its surrounding container similar to the reference — text neither obviously larger nor obviously smaller relative to the cards, buttons, or panels containing it?
